name: Coney Island Hot Dog Sauce#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the fat in a saucepan.
2. Add the ground beef and onion to the pan. Cook until the meat and onions are brown, breaking the meat into fine pieces.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: tomato sauce, water, vinegar, pickle relish, salt, chili powder, prepared mustard, pepper, and cayenne.
4. Simmer the mixture for about 30 minutes, uncovered, stirring occasionally until the sauce thickens.
5. The finished sauce makes about 1 3/4 cups and serves approximately one dozen hot dogs and rolls.
